name: stablewatch-lending
description: Stablewatch-style lending analytics prototype with adapter-first ingestion, Postgres, NestJS, React, and R2 materialized JSON.

scripts.prepare:packages: pnpm --filter @stablewatch-lending/core build && pnpm --filter @stablewatch-lending/db build && pnpm --filter @stablewatch-lending/adapters build && pnpm --filter @stablewatch-lending/quality build
scripts.db:push: pnpm --filter @stablewatch-lending/server exec tsx ../../scripts/prisma.ts db push --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter @stablewatch-lending/server exec tsx ../../scripts/prisma.ts migrate dev --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:baseline:init: pnpm --filter @stablewatch-lending/server exec tsx ../../scripts/prisma.ts migrate resolve --applied 20260714000000_init --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.db:deploy: pnpm --filter @stablewatch-lending/server exec tsx ../../scripts/prisma.ts migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
